title: COPY INTO fails on perfectly clean CSV file
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Batting (playerID String NOT NULL, yearID Int32, stint Int32 DEFAULT 1, teamID String, lgID String, G Int32 DEFAULT 0, AB Int32 DEFAULT 0, R Int32 DEFAULT 0, H Int32 DEFAULT 0, X2B Int32 DEFAULT 0, X3B Int32 DEFAULT 0, HR Int32 DEFAULT 0, RBI Int32 DEFAULT 0, SB Int32 DEFAULT 0, CS Int32 DEFAULT 0, BB Int32 DEFAULT 0, SO Int32 DEFAULT 0, IBB Int32 DEFAULT 0, HBP Int32 DEFAULT 0, SH Int32 DEFAULT 0, SF Int32 DEFAULT 0, GIDP Int32 DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO Batting (playerID, yearID, teamID) VALUES ('player1', 2023, 'teamA');
SELECT playerID, yearID, teamID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = (SELECT MAX(yearID) FROM Batting);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Batting WHERE G IS NULL OR AB IS NULL;
INSERT INTO Batting SELECT * FROM file('/path/to/clean.csv', 'CSV');
key_bug_features: COPY INTO fails on clean CSV file
